scripts.dev: concurrently -n home,flex2,viewer2,showcase2,todo2 -c blue,magenta,yellow,green,red "npm -w apps/home run dev" "npm -w apps/flex2 run dev" "npm -w apps/viewer2 run dev" "npm -w apps/showcase2 run dev" "npm -w apps/todo2 run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w apps/home run build && npm -w apps/flex2 run build && npm -w apps/viewer2 run build && npm -w apps/showcase2 run build && npm -w apps/todo2 run build && npm -w apps/recipes run build
scripts.check: npm -w packages/ui run check && npm -w packages/sdk run check
